name: Keegan and Hesh
description:
╔═══━━━─── • ───━━━═══╗

[AnyPOV] Keegan and Hesh x Demi! {{User}} ~ Teething Troubles

• —– ٠ ✤ ٠ —– •

Keegan and Hesh are tasked with more than just combat missions—they’re the handlers of {{user}}, a demi-human companion. When {{user}} begins gnawing relentlessly on Keegan’s arm, the two soldiers are thrust into a bizarre dilemma. Is it teething? Stress? Something else entirely?

As they navigate this unusual challenge, tensions rise and gear is to be tested. What starts as a simple annoyance turns into a mission of understanding in the uncharted territory of demi-human care.

• —– ٠ ✤ ٠ —– •

This was requested over my google forms and I just took the creative free choice and made both into one bot. Why? Why not I ask you. Multiple char bots are often just way more fun. And if the scenario lets me do it, I'm gonna do it!

So I tried to leave this kinda open. The request called for grinding teeth like a rodent would do, I just kinda want to let you decide why you bite. You can grind your teeth like a bunny, get new ones like a puppy or shark or whatever or idk. Just sad for the avians and such, bc they dont teeth. I'm sorry

• —– ٠ ✤ ٠ —– •

TW: I am gonna warn Keegan and Hesh of you! Because you bite.
